title: [unit test] panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. make localunit

**Describe the results you received:**
```
=== RUN   TestCreateNewSHMBadSizeRoundsUp
    TestCreateNewSHMBadSizeRoundsUp: shm_lock_test.go:78:
                Error Trace:    shm_lock_test.go:78
                Error:          Received unexpected error:
                                file exists
                                failed to create 7 locks in /test1
                                github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm.CreateSHMLock
                                        /home/fedora/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm/shm_lock.go:54
                                github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm.TestCreateNewSHMBadSizeRoundsUp
                                        /home/fedora/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm/shm_lock_test.go:77
                                testing.tRunner
                                        /usr/lib/golang/src/testing/testing.go:991
                                runtime.goexit
                                        /usr/lib/golang/src/runtime/asm_amd64.s:1373
                Test:           TestCreateNewSHMBadSizeRoundsUp
--- FAIL: TestCreateNewSHMBadSizeRoundsUp (0.00s)
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference [recovered]
        panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x8 pc=0x6a38a3]

goroutine 19 [running]:
testing.tRunner.func1.1(0x6ea700, 0x973c20)
        /usr/lib/golang/src/testing/testing.go:940 +0x2f5
testing.tRunner.func1(0xc0000ce480)
        /usr/lib/golang/src/testing/testing.go:943 +0x3f9
panic(0x6ea700, 0x973c20)
        /usr/lib/golang/src/runtime/panic.go:969 +0x166
github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm.(*SHMLocks).GetMaxLocks(...)
        /home/fedora/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm/shm_lock.go:95
github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm.TestCreateNewSHMBadSizeRoundsUp(0xc0000ce480)
        /home/fedora/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/lock/shm/shm_lock_test.go:80 +0xa3
testing.tRunner(0xc0000ce480, 0x75bdf0)
        /usr/lib/golang/src/testing/testing.go:991 +0xdc
created by testing.(*T).Run
        /usr/lib/golang/src/testing/testing.go:1042 +0x357

Ginkgo ran 5 suites in 16.575443792s
Test Suite Failed
make: *** [Makefile:293: localunit] Error 1
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
fix it

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            2.0.0-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.14.2
Git Commit:         18b273b72ba76d485eb1b4d5df48bff1685953ff
Built:              Mon May 11 08:41:52 2020
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
host:
  arch: amd64
  buildahVersion: 1.15.0-dev
  cgroupVersion: v2
  conmon:
    package: conmon-2.0.15-1.fc32.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.15, commit: 33da5ef83bf2abc7965fc37980a49d02fdb71826'
  cpus: 4
  distribution:
    distribution: fedora
    version: "32"
  eventLogger: file
  hostname: fedora31
  idMappings:
    gidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
    uidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
  kernel: 5.6.10-300.fc32.x86_64
  memFree: 2892550144
  memTotal: 4118323200
  ociRuntime:
    name: crun
    package: crun-0.13-2.fc32.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/crun
    version: |-
      crun version 0.13
      commit: e79e4de4ac16da0ce48777afb72c6241de870525
      spec: 1.0.0
      +SYSTEMD +SELINUX +APPARMOR +CAP +SECCOMP +EBPF +YAJL
  os: linux
  rootless: true
  slirp4netns:
    executable: ""
    package: ""
    version: ""
  swapFree: 0
  swapTotal: 0
  uptime: 44m 22.33s
registries:
  search:
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.centos.org
  - docker.io
store:
  configFile: /home/fedora/.config/containers/storage.conf
  containerStore:
    number: 0
    paused: 0
    running: 0
    stopped: 0
  graphDriverName: vfs
  graphOptions: {}
  graphRoot: /home/fedora/.local/share/containers/storage
  graphStatus: {}
  imageStore:
    number: 0
  runRoot: /run/user/1000/containers
  volumePath: /home/fedora/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes
version:
  Built: 1589186512
  GitCommit: 18b273b72ba76d485eb1b4d5df48bff1685953ff
  GoVersion: go1.14.2
  OsArch: linux/amd64
  RemoteAPIVersion: 1
  Version: 2.0.0-dev
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
[fedora@fedora32 libpod]$ git rev-parse HEAD
18b273b72ba76d485eb1b4d5df48bff1685953ff
```
```
$ cat /etc/redhat-release
Fedora release 32 (Thirty Two)

$ rpm -q crun
crun-0.13-2.fc32.x86_64
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Openstack

comments.body: While it's unclear to me why the test continues facing an unexpected error, I opened https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/6169 to add an extra nil check.
